# Use the Settings API to configure Stripe Tax

Learn how to configure tax settings, and check whether an account is ready to perform tax calculations.

## Index

This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case:

- [Connect platform](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/settings-api.md?tax-integration=connect-platform)
- [Direct usage](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/settings-api.md?tax-integration=direct)
